summary: Schedule Manager CRUD Testing Complete - All Features Working. Backend 100% (32/32 tests passed), Frontend 100% (All Schedule CRUD operations work correctly).
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with admin/headlock2024 works correctly
Navigate to 'Trainingszeiten' tab in admin sidebar - works
Schedule table shows existing entries with day, time, title, description, status, and action buttons (edit + delete)
Click 'Trainingszeit hinzufügen' button - form opens with day selector, time inputs, bilingual title/description, active switch
Add a new schedule entry: Select 'Mittwoch', time 18:00-20:00, title 'Abendtraining'/'Evening Training' - WORKS
New entry appears in the schedule table after saving
Click edit button on an entry - form pre-fills with existing data (Trainingszeit bearbeiten heading)
Edit the entry (change time from 18:00-20:00 to 19:00-21:00), save - table updates correctly
Click delete on test entry - confirmation dialog shows 'Wirklich löschen?' - confirm and entry disappears
Homepage /: Schedule section displays entries dynamically from database
Backend CRUD: POST /api/admin/schedule creates new entry - 200 OK
Backend CRUD: PUT /api/admin/schedule/{id} updates entry - 200 OK
Backend CRUD: DELETE /api/admin/schedule/{id} deletes entry - 200 OK with confirmation
Backend: GET /api/schedule returns only active entries - verified
Backend: GET /api/admin/schedule returns ALL entries (including inactive) - verified
critical_code_review_comments: ScheduleManager.jsx is well-implemented with full CRUD capabilities (~288 lines)
Form properly handles bilingual fields (German/English) for titles and descriptions
Day selector correctly syncs German and English day names
Active/Inactive toggle works correctly - inactive entries hidden from public API
Edit form correctly pre-fills with existing data
seed_data_creation: Test schedule entries created during testing were cleaned up. Current database has 1 schedule entry (Samstag Wöchentliches Training).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule Manager CRUD is fully functional. The component (/app/frontend/src/components/admin/ScheduleManager.jsx) handles Add/Edit/Delete with bilingual support (German/English). All data-testid attributes present: add-schedule-btn, save-schedule-btn. Backend endpoints for Schedule CRUD are at /api/admin/schedule (GET, POST), /api/admin/schedule/{id} (PUT, DELETE). Public endpoint /api/schedule returns only active entries.

schedule_crud_verification.create: PASSED - New entries added successfully with day selector, time pickers, bilingual fields
schedule_crud_verification.read: PASSED - Table displays all entries, public API returns only active entries
schedule_crud_verification.update: PASSED - Edit form pre-fills correctly, changes persist after save
schedule_crud_verification.delete: PASSED - Confirmation dialog works, entries removed from database

ui_elements_verified.day_selector: Select dropdown with Montag-Sonntag options - WORKS
ui_elements_verified.time_inputs: type='time' for start and end - WORKS
ui_elements_verified.bilingual_title_inputs: German and English title fields - WORKS
ui_elements_verified.bilingual_description_textareas: German and English description fields - WORKS
ui_elements_verified.edit_button: First action button per row - WORKS
ui_elements_verified.delete_button: Second action button per row with confirmation - WORKS
